AC-001.evidence: getOverview endpoint returns totalLeads, totalRevenue, openOpportunities, winRate, recentActivity via 8 parallel queries

AC-002.evidence: getSalesMetrics returns pipelineValue, winRate, avgDealSize, avgSalesCycleDays, totalRevenue, closedWonCount, closedLostCount

AC-003.evidence: getLeadMetrics returns total, bySource, byStatus, conversionRate

AC-004.evidence: getConversionFunnel returns 7 stages with zero-fill and per-stage conversion

AC-005.evidence: getTimeSeriesData accepts metric + granularity, returns time series points with date range limits

AC-006.evidence: exportReport supports json/csv formats, delegates by reportType (sales/leads/funnel/timeseries/overview)

AC-007.evidence: All 6 endpoints use protectedProcedure + tenantId from context

AC-008.evidence: All composite endpoints use Promise.all for parallel queries

AC-009.evidence: All divisions guarded with total > 0 checks, tests verify zero data returns 0 not NaN/Infinity

AC-010.evidence: All data sourced from AnalyticsRepository port methods, no mock/static data

validation_results.name: TypeScript
validation_results.stdout_hash: pre-existing opportunity.router.ts errors not related to IFC-190

notes: Fixed makeCtx() test helper bug: changed 'overrides?.analytics !== undefined' to 'overrides && "analytics" in overrides' pattern. Pre-existing TS errors in opportunity.router.ts are unrelated to IFC-190.
